title: agrostis palustris var. stricta
intro: Agrostis palustris var. stricta, also known as strict bog bentgrass or strict bent, is a rare and little-known variety of grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Agrostis palustris var. stricta include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or using them in tinctures and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
